questions.question: 1 (a) Which is the expression for the equilibrium constant, K p ? (1) A K p = 2 2 3 22 p pp SO SOO    B K p = SO SOO 3 2 2 2 2              C K p = p pp SO SOO 3 2 2 2 2    D K p = pp p SOO SO 2 2 2 3 2    (b) Which statement about this equilibrium is correct? (1) A increasing the pressure
questions.text: 1 (a) Which is the expression for the equilibrium constant, K p ? (1) A K p = 2 2 3 22 p pp SO SOO    B K p = SO SOO 3 2 2 2 2              C K p = p pp SO SOO 3 2 2 2 2    D K p = pp p SOO SO 2 2 2 3 2    (b) Which statement about this equilibrium is correct? (1) A increasing the pressure
